title: gonolobus albomarginatus
intro: Gonolobus albomarginatus, also known as the White-Margin Vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, allowing it to be used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Gonolobus albomarginatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Gonolobus albomarginatus typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves or roots, which can be used to create teas, salves, or ointments for topical application.
